scripts.cli: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run start --filter=@linear-insights/cli
scripts.insights: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run start --filter=@linear-insights/cli -- insights
scripts.sync: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run start --filter=@linear-insights/cli -- sync
scripts.app:dev: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run dev --filter=@linear-insights/app
scripts.app:dev:with-report: LINEAR_INSIGHTS_JSON_OUTPUT=$PWD/apps/app/public/report.json dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run start --filter=@linear-insights/cli -- insights && dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm exec turbo run dev --filter=@linear-insights/app
